---
name: Pattern Request
about: Suggest a new RAG pattern to implement
title: "[PATTERN] "
labels: pattern-request
assignees: ""
---

## Pattern Name

e.g., Graph RAG, RAPTOR, Corrective RAG

## Description

What does this pattern do differently?

## Key Paper / Reference

Link to the paper or blog post describing this approach.

## Expected Benefits

What queries or scenarios would this improve?

## Implementation Notes

Any thoughts on how this maps to the BaseRAGPattern interface
(which steps would be overridden, new dependencies needed, etc.).
